title: Queenless Apiary: Raid-Free Hive Activation
strategies: diagonal baseline: activate the all-zero address plus each single-1 address (n+1 hives, always raid-free)
lexicographic greedy: scan non-flooded addresses in canonical order, activate each hive iff it completes no raiding line with the already-activated set
seeded multi-restart randomized greedy: try many shuffled activation orders and keep the largest raid-free set found
algebraic product construction: build a large cap set as a Cartesian product of maximum small-dimension caps, then drop flooded addresses
